description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Manually regenerate the standard sitemap that currently has the highest error count.
tasks.name: Manually regenerate the standard sitemap that currently has the highest error count.
tasks.description: Manually regenerate the standard sitemap that currently has the highest error count.

tasks.instruction: Create a new sitemap that includes only URLs under the /blog path, configured to auto-generate weekly with default change frequency daily and priority 0.6.
tasks.name: Create a new sitemap that includes only URLs under the /blog path, configured to auto-generate weekly with default change frequency daily and priority 0.6.
tasks.description: Create a new sitemap that includes only URLs under the /blog path, configured to auto-generate weekly with default change frequency daily and priority 0.6.

tasks.instruction: From a single sitemap’s URL list, export all URLs that return HTTP status 404 and have priority of at least 0.7.
tasks.name: From a single sitemap’s URL list, export all URLs that return HTTP status 404 and have priority of at least 0.7.
tasks.description: From a single sitemap’s URL list, export all URLs that return HTTP status 404 and have priority of at least 0.7.

tasks.instruction: In the sitemap that lists product pages, set the priority to 1.0 for the 5 most recently modified URLs using a bulk update.
tasks.name: In the sitemap that lists product pages, set the priority to 1.0 for the 5 most recently modified URLs using a bulk update.
tasks.description: In the sitemap that lists product pages, set the priority to 1.0 for the 5 most recently modified URLs using a bulk update.

tasks.instruction: Among standard sitemaps, set auto-generation to daily for the sitemap with the fewest URLs and to weekly for the sitemap with the most URLs.
tasks.name: Among standard sitemaps, set auto-generation to daily for the sitemap with the fewest URLs and to weekly for the sitemap with the most URLs.
tasks.description: Among standard sitemaps, set auto-generation to daily for the sitemap with the fewest URLs and to weekly for the sitemap with the most URLs.

tasks.instruction: Within one sitemap’s URL list, bulk exclude all URLs that are not indexed and return HTTP status 404.
tasks.name: Within one sitemap’s URL list, bulk exclude all URLs that are not indexed and return HTTP status 404.
tasks.description: Within one sitemap’s URL list, bulk exclude all URLs that are not indexed and return HTTP status 404.

tasks.instruction: Disable auto-generation for the standard sitemap with fewer than 50 URLs and zero errors that was most recently generated.
tasks.name: Disable auto-generation for the standard sitemap with fewer than 50 URLs and zero errors that was most recently generated.
tasks.description: Disable auto-generation for the standard sitemap with fewer than 50 URLs and zero errors that was most recently generated.

tasks.instruction: In the sitemap that currently contains only policy and terms pages, add a /contact URL with weekly change frequency and priority 0.3.
tasks.name: In the sitemap that currently contains only policy and terms pages, add a /contact URL with weekly change frequency and priority 0.3.
tasks.description: In the sitemap that currently contains only policy and terms pages, add a /contact URL with weekly change frequency and priority 0.3.

tasks.instruction: In the sitemap that lists news articles, change the change frequency to hourly for all URLs last modified within the past 7 days.
tasks.name: In the sitemap that lists news articles, change the change frequency to hourly for all URLs last modified within the past 7 days.
tasks.description: In the sitemap that lists news articles, change the change frequency to hourly for all URLs last modified within the past 7 days.
